name: 7-Day Quantum Reality Codes Challenge
description: A structured 7-day community challenge designed to deepen intention practice and grow the community through engagement and viral sharing.

structure.title: Set Your Intention
structure.goal: Get participants to create their first Reality Code and share it
structure.action: Visit the website, create a code, post it in the group
structure.engagement_metric: Number of codes shared in comments
structure.growth_mechanism: Participants sharing codes creates social proof and curiosity

structure.title: Meditation with Creation Frequency
structure.goal: Deepen the practice through meditation on the Amplify page
structure.growth_mechanism: Meditation creates personal investment in the practice

structure.title: Science Deep-Dive
structure.goal: Build intellectual trust through scientific evidence
structure.action: Read a science article from qrcodes-science/ and share an insight
structure.engagement_metric: Number of comments sharing scientific insights
structure.growth_mechanism: Science content is highly shareable and builds credibility

structure.title: Share Your Story
structure.action: Share a synchronicity, shift, or win since starting the challenge
structure.growth_mechanism: Stories create emotional connection and attract new members

structure.title: Collective Code Day
structure.goal: Unite the group around a single collective intention
structure.action: Everyone meditates on the same code at the same time
structure.engagement_metric: Number of participants in the collective session
structure.growth_mechanism: Group events create belonging and FOMO for non-participants

structure.title: Growth Day — Invite a Friend
structure.action: Invite one person to the community with a personal message
structure.growth_mechanism: Personal invitation has the highest conversion rate of any growth tactic

structure.title: Reflection & Celebration
structure.goal: Seal the experience and create anticipation for the next challenge
structure.action: Answer 5 reflection prompts and share in the group
structure.engagement_metric: Number of reflections shared + retention rate for next challenge
structure.growth_mechanism: Public reflection creates commitment and attracts curious onlookers

timing.timezone_note: Adjust to your community's primary timezone

success_metrics.excellent: 30+ participants with 10+ new members from Day 6
